data.amount_semantics: Tencent row[8] * 10,000 CNY; retained before AkShare truncation
data.source: Tencent qfq daily endpoint; raw Sina B084 close for nominal scale

frozen_protocol.fund_fee_handling: already embedded in ETF market total return; not deducted twice
frozen_protocol.legacy_sensitivity: positive signals renormalized to 100%, matching old B084 code
frozen_protocol.lot_model: target holdings rounded to nominal-open 100-share lots; existing holdings carry as total-return notionals, so trade shares/cost/capacity are an approximation rather than a full share ledger
frozen_protocol.primary_allocation: five fixed 20% sleeves; negative or unavailable sleeve stays cash
frozen_protocol.selected_weighting: equal weight; failed/locked buys remain cash; no replacement

research_boundary.historical_contamination: C2-DIRECT: B084 dates and windows were already inspected

study: A-share ETF 12-month absolute-momentum strict B084 follow-up
